Formula.Hint: Fallback dice formula used to convert stress (useful for homebrew macros).
Formula.Name: Stress Conversion Formula

MinStressConversion.Hint: If enabled, stress conversion is capped at 0 instead of minimum stress.
MinStressConversion.Name: Convert Minimum Stress

NoSanitySave.Hint: If enabled, stress will be converted without a sanity save.
NoSanitySave.Name: No Sanity Save

NoStressRelieve.Hint: If enabled, stress will not be reset to minimum after stress conversion.
NoStressRelieve.Name: No Stress Relieve

EnableCharacterCreator.Hint: If enabled, replaces the old character creation macro with the new QoL version.
EnableCharacterCreator.Name: Enable QoL Character Creator

ShoreLeaveEditor.Hint: Configure shore leave rules, stress conversion behavior, and tier formulas in one dialog.
ShoreLeaveEditor.Label: Configure Shore Leave...
ShoreLeaveEditor.Name: Configure Shore Leave

DisableFlavor.Hint: Disable the randomized flavor of shore leave activities.
DisableFlavor.Name: Disable shore leave flavor

RandomFlavor.Hint: Enhance simple shore leave with random, flavored activities.
RandomFlavor.Name: Flavored shore leave activities

ThemeColor.Hint: If set, this will override the player colors.
ThemeColor.Name: Global Theme Color

ThemeColorOverride.Hint: If set, this will override the default color for this user.
ThemeColorOverride.Name: Player Theme Color

ToolbandConfig.Hint: Choose which QoL toolbar buttons are available on each supported sheet type.
ToolbandConfig.Label: Configure Toolbar...
ToolbandConfig.Name: Configure Toolbar

ApplyDamageConfig.Hint: Choose how Apply Damage handles armor and wound-roll automation per actor category.
ApplyDamageConfig.Label: Configure Apply Damage...
ApplyDamageConfig.Name: Configure Apply Damage

TougherArmor.Hint: If enabled, armor only breaks when damage remains after armor reduction. If disabled, armor also breaks when armor reduces the damage to exactly 0.
TougherArmor.Name: Tougher Armor

ApplyArmorBroken.Hint: If enabled, Apply Damage can automatically set the Armor Broken status.
ApplyArmorBroken.Name: Auto-apply Armor Broken

Character.Hint: If enabled, Apply Damage will automatically trigger wound rolls for player characters when damage causes wounds.
Character.Name: Player Characters

Contractor.Hint: If enabled, Apply Damage will automatically trigger wound rolls for contractors when damage causes wounds.
Contractor.Name: Contractors

Creature.Hint: If enabled, Apply Damage will automatically trigger wound rolls for creatures when damage causes wounds.
Creature.Name: Creatures

ApplyDamageVisibility.Name: Apply Damage Button Visibility
ApplyDamageVisibility.Hint: Choose who can see Apply Damage buttons in chat cards and token controls. Disabled hides all Apply Damage buttons.

ApplyDamageTargetLogic.Name: Apply Damage Target Logic
ApplyDamageTargetLogic.Hint: Choose target selection when Apply Damage is called without a target actor.

TrainingConfig.Hint: Choose whether training adds the selected skill directly or stores it in the character skill-training field.
TrainingConfig.Label: Configure Training...
TrainingConfig.Name: Configure Training

UseSkillTraining.Hint: If enabled, training writes the selected skill name to the sheet training field instead of adding the skill item immediately.
UseSkillTraining.Name: Use Skill Training

AutoTrainAfterShoreLeave.Name: Auto Train after Shore Leave
AutoTrainAfterShoreLeave.Hint: If enabled, the training tool runs automatically after a shore leave is completed, whether the stress conversion succeeds or not.

Editor.DefaultTiersFallback: Submitted shore leave tiers were empty or invalid. Defaults were saved instead.

ShoreLeave.NoActorForStressConversion: No actor available for stress conversion.
ShoreLeave.CannotAfford: {actorName} cannot afford this shore leave activity.

AlreadyCompleted.Content:
{actorName} has already completed character creation.
Do you want to reset and start over?
AlreadyCompleted.Title: Character Already Completed

Warning.NoValidData: No valid character creator data found for {actorName}!
Warning.OverwriteRisk: Proceeding might overwrite an existing character.
Warning.Title: Character Creator: Warning

Notifications.NoClassUuid: No class UUID found. Please select a class.
Notifications.TrainingSkillLoadFailed: Selected training skill could not be loaded.

SelectAttributes.MustSelectOnePerSet: You must select one attribute per set.
SelectAttributes.Title: Select Attributes

SelectSkills.DependencyNeedsSkill: {skillName} needs this skill to remain selected.
SelectSkills.Title: Select Skills

Table.EmptyState: No {tabLabel} in this roster yet. Drag and drop new {tabLabel} into this tab to add them.
Table.Name: Name

Promote.Title: Promote Contractor
Promote.Content: How would you like to promote this contractor?

Damage.EnterAmount: Enter the amount of damage to apply:
Damage.EnterAmountForActor: Enter the amount of damage to apply to {actorName}:
Damage.EnterAmountForTokens: Enter the amount of damage to apply to {count} selected {tokens}:
Damage.PositiveValueRequired: Please enter a positive damage value.
Damage.MaximumWoundsContent: {actorName} has reached their maximum number of wounds!

Chat.NoActor: No actor available for chat output.

Training.NotEnoughXp: Not enough XP to learn {rankLabel} Skill {skillName}.

NoItemsFound.Title: No Items Found
NoItemsFound.Content:
MoSh Greybearded QoL could not find any valid {itemType} items in your World Items collection or in any loaded compendium.

To ensure correct functionality, please install a compatible compendium pack or create your own items in the World Items collection.
NoItemsFound.Warning: MoSh Greybearded QoL: No items found. Install a compatible compendium pack or create items in the World.
